info.name: VC Promotions & Coupons
info.description: Comprehensive test collection for Virto Commerce Promotions & Coupons module. 16 promotions (P01-P16), 25 coupons (COU-001 to COU-025), 8 edge cases (E01-E08). Data source: test-data/promotions/. Env vars: baseUrl, frontUrl, admin, adminPassword, storeId, userEmail, userPassword, cultureName, currencyCode.

exec: console.log('User token acquired for storefront GraphQL');

item.name: [02-Promotions CRUD] List All Promotions
item.description: GET all promotions with keyword filter

item.name: [02-Promotions CRUD] Search Promotions by Keyword
item.description: POST search with keyword, pagination, store filter

item.name: [02-Promotions CRUD] Seed P01 - QA Test - VCST-4590 Coupon Public

body.raw:
{
  "name": "QA Test - VCST-4590 Coupon Public",
  "storeIds": [
    "{{storeId}}"
  ],
  "isActive": true,
  "isPublic": true,
  "priority": 1,
  "isExclusive": false,
  "description": "QA Coupon English Description",
  "endDate": "2026-12-31T23:59:59Z",
  "couponRequired": true
}

item.description: P01: QA Coupon English Description | Active:true Public:true Priority:1 Exclusive:false

item.description: Verify all coupons assigned to P01

item.name: [03-Coupons Management] Search Coupons for P15 (Usage Limits)
item.description: Verify usage limit coupons on P15

item.name: [04-Storefront GraphQL] Query promotionCoupons (Public List)

graphql.query: query PromotionCoupons($storeId: String!, $cultureName: String, $currencyCode: String, $first: Int) { promotionCoupons(storeId: $storeId, cultureName: $cultureName, currencyCode: $currencyCode, first: $first) { totalCount items { code description promotionId promotionName isPublic } } }

item.description: List public coupons. Verify P08 (private) and P10 (auto) excluded.

item.name: [04-Storefront GraphQL] addCoupon - Apply QA10OFF

graphql.query: mutation AddCoupon($command: InputAddCouponType!) { addCoupon(command: $command) { id coupons { code isAppliedSuccessfully } discountTotal { amount formattedAmount } validationErrors { errorCode errorMessage } } }

item.description: Apply 10% off coupon to cart

item.name: [04-Storefront GraphQL] removeCoupon - Remove QA10OFF

graphql.query: mutation RemoveCoupon($command: InputRemoveCouponType!) { removeCoupon(command: $command) { id coupons { code } discountTotal { amount } } }

item.description: Remove 10% off coupon from cart

item.name: [04-Storefront GraphQL] addCoupon - Apply SUPER

graphql.query: mutation AddCoupon($command: InputAddCouponType!) { addCoupon(command: $command) { id coupons { code isAppliedSuccessfully } discountTotal { amount formattedAmount } validationErrors { errorCode errorMessage } } }

item.description: Apply 20% off for stacking test

item.name: [04-Storefront GraphQL] removeCoupon - Remove SUPER

graphql.query: mutation RemoveCoupon($command: InputRemoveCouponType!) { removeCoupon(command: $command) { id coupons { code } discountTotal { amount } } }

item.description: Cleanup SUPER coupon

item.name: [05-Edge Cases] E01 - QA-MAXED: Maxed-out total uses

graphql.query: mutation AddCoupon($command: InputAddCouponType!) { addCoupon(command: $command) { id coupons { code isAppliedSuccessfully } discountTotal { amount formattedAmount } validationErrors { errorCode errorMessage } } }

exec: else pm.test('E01: code not found (rejected)', () => pm.expect(true).to.be.true);
console.log('E01: Maxed-out total uses test completed');

item.description: Coupon at max total uses must be rejected. Precondition: QA-MAXED used once.

item.name: [05-Edge Cases] E02 - QA-PERCUST: Per-customer limit reached

graphql.query: mutation AddCoupon($command: InputAddCouponType!) { addCoupon(command: $command) { id coupons { code isAppliedSuccessfully } discountTotal { amount formattedAmount } validationErrors { errorCode errorMessage } } }

exec: else pm.test('E02: code not found (rejected)', () => pm.expect(true).to.be.true);
console.log('E02: Per-customer limit reached test completed');

item.description: Same user second attempt must be rejected.

item.name: [05-Edge Cases] E03 - QA-CPNEXPIRED: Coupon-level expiry (past)

graphql.query: mutation AddCoupon($command: InputAddCouponType!) { addCoupon(command: $command) { id coupons { code isAppliedSuccessfully } discountTotal { amount formattedAmount } validationErrors { errorCode errorMessage } } }

exec: else pm.test('E03: code not found (rejected)', () => pm.expect(true).to.be.true);

item.description: Expired coupon rejected even if promotion is still active.

item.name: [05-Edge Cases] E04 - EXPIRED-TEST: Promotion inactive

graphql.query: mutation AddCoupon($command: InputAddCouponType!) { addCoupon(command: $command) { id coupons { code isAppliedSuccessfully } discountTotal { amount formattedAmount } validationErrors { errorCode errorMessage } } }

exec: else pm.test('E04: code not found (rejected)', () => pm.expect(true).to.be.true);

item.description: Coupon on inactive promotion (P09) must be rejected.

item.name: [05-Edge Cases] E05 - INVALID CODE!: Invalid characters

graphql.query: mutation AddCoupon($command: InputAddCouponType!) { addCoupon(command: $command) { id coupons { code isAppliedSuccessfully } discountTotal { amount formattedAmount } validationErrors { errorCode errorMessage } } }

exec: else pm.test('E05: code not found (rejected)', () => pm.expect(true).to.be.true);

item.description: Non-existent/invalid code must be rejected.

item.name: [05-Edge Cases] E06a - Apply EXCLUSIVE10 (globally exclusive)

graphql.query: mutation AddCoupon($command: InputAddCouponType!) { addCoupon(command: $command) { id coupons { code isAppliedSuccessfully } discountTotal { amount formattedAmount } validationErrors { errorCode errorMessage } } }

item.description: Apply exclusive coupon first

item.name: [05-Edge Cases] E06b - Try stacking SUPER after EXCLUSIVE10

graphql.query: mutation AddCoupon($command: InputAddCouponType!) { addCoupon(command: $command) { id coupons { code isAppliedSuccessfully } discountTotal { amount formattedAmount } validationErrors { errorCode errorMessage } } }

exec: if (c) pm.test('E06b: SUPER blocked by exclusivity', () => pm.expect(c.isAppliedSuccessfully).to.be.false);

item.description: Second coupon must be blocked by exclusivity

item.name: [05-Edge Cases] E06c - Cleanup: Remove EXCLUSIVE10

graphql.query: mutation RemoveCoupon($command: InputRemoveCouponType!) { removeCoupon(command: $command) { id coupons { code } discountTotal { amount } } }

item.description: Remove exclusive coupon from cart

item.name: [05-Edge Cases] E07 - Auto Gift hidden from coupons page

graphql.query: query PromotionCoupons($storeId: String!, $cultureName: String, $currencyCode: String, $first: Int) { promotionCoupons(storeId: $storeId, cultureName: $cultureName, currencyCode: $currencyCode, first: $first) { totalCount items { code description promotionId promotionName isPublic } } }

exec: pm.test('E07: Auto Gift excluded', () => pm.expect(names).to.not.include('Auto Gift (no coupon)'));

item.description: P10 (no coupons) must not appear in promotionCoupons query

item.name: [05-Edge Cases] E08 - Store-scoped visibility (P01 on B2B-store)

graphql.query: query PromotionCoupons($storeId: String!, $cultureName: String, $currencyCode: String, $first: Int) { promotionCoupons(storeId: $storeId, cultureName: $cultureName, currencyCode: $currencyCode, first: $first) { totalCount items { code description promotionId promotionName isPublic } } }

exec: pm.test('E08: QA10OFF visible on store', () => pm.expect(codes).to.include('QA10OFF'));

item.description: QA10OFF must be visible on assigned store

graphql.query: mutation RemoveCoupon($command: InputRemoveCouponType!) { removeCoupon(command: $command) { id coupons { code } discountTotal { amount } } }

item.description: Remove any remaining coupons from test user cart
